---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 121, Safari 17]
- Deployment: [e.g. Docker Compose, bare metal]
- Version/commit: [e.g. v1.2.0 or commit SHA]
